textByHash.10edadb1574d4dc769ae598995b40744475fd862: Welcome to my private little wyvern area.
textByHash.0478db05fe41071af1e2fb846e2dc93262d2df34: I'm Pieve. My big brother Steve made this training area, but he's gone off to be a Slayer Master to replace our cousin Nieve, so this area's mine now.
textByHash.eaa1a9e214d14a02b9fc5b4a3382978b91c6caa5: My brother, Steve, carved the steps to get up here. He was jealous of our cousin, Nieve, because she'd got a huge training cave where she could boss people around. So he made this place.
textByHash.ea5b4183988fdbf38e44f45093b1fc1cef1ef1bc: No, I'm not. My brother Steve is a Slayer Master. He took over the job from our cousin Nieve. All he has to do is tell people to kill stuff - he says it's easy!
textByHash.4a4df9e705a6f1d59035c917e5e2c787a6b7fc28: That's not your assigned Slayer target. Up here, I expect people to focus on their Slayer training.
